script: echo '===== Find Aixa Teams app artifacts =====' && find /home/azureuser -maxdepth 4 -iname '*aixa*' -type f 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(zip|json)$' | grep -viE '\.bak|activities|conversation-refs|outbound|offset' | head -20 && echo && echo '===== Check known manifest locations =====' && for p in /home/azureuser/aixa-app/manifest.json /home/azureuser/aixa-bot-app/manifest.json /home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/manifest.json /home/azureuser/aixa-teams-app.zip /home/azureuser/aixa-app.zip; do [ -e "$p" ] && echo "FOUND: $p ($(stat -c '%y' $p))"; done && echo && echo '===== Inspect any aixa zip contents =====' && for z in $(find /home/azureuser -maxdepth 4 -iname 'aixa*.zip' -type f 2>/dev/null); do echo "=== $z ==="; unzip -p "$z" manifest.json 2>/dev/null | jq '{version, bots: [.bots[]? | {botId, scopes}], name}' 2>&1 | head -30; done && echo && echo '===== Test SENDER with a syntactically-valid group chat id =====' && /home/azureuser/aixa-send-to.sh 'TEST DO NOT DELIVER — diagnostic only' '19:00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000@thread.v2' 2>&1 | tail -10; echo "sender_rc=$?"
